rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Both of you were safe!
Thank goodness[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We finally found you, mo!
We searched all over the place, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0032
rows.name: Elma smiles, seeing the two looking healthy.

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0025
rows.name: From the looks of it, neither of you are badly hurt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0027
rows.name: We are going to head back to where Void is, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0035
rows.name: Before that, do you have a minute?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0063
rows.name: It looks like some kind of ruin, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0064
rows.name: a massive artificial structure in a place like this[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0065
rows.name: If it's there for a reason[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0067
rows.name: there is a possibility it's connected to Void[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0068
rows.name: Yes, I was thinking the exact same thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Tatsu is curious too, mo.
Let's take a little detour and investigate, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0090
rows.name:
Yes.
We need any information we can get right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33500100_MSG0100
rows.name: Let's investigate it, just to be sure.[ST:wait ]
